description: Secure credential management with encrypted vault storage

store_credential.name: Store Credential
store_credential.description: Store a credential securely in the encrypted vault

get_credential.name: Get Credential
get_credential.description: Retrieve a stored credential with username, password, and metadata

get_username.name: Get Username
get_username.description: Get the username from a stored credential

get_password.name: Get Password
get_password.description: Get the password from a stored credential

list_credentials.name: List Credentials
list_credentials.description: Get list of all stored credential names

credential_exists.name: Credential Exists
credential_exists.description: Check if a credential exists in the vault

update_credential.name: Update Credential
update_credential.description: Update an existing credential's username, password, or metadata

get_environment_credential.name: Get Environment Credential
get_environment_credential.description: Get a credential from environment variables

set_environment_credential.name: Set Environment Credential
set_environment_credential.description: Set environment variables from a stored credential
